title: neopanax macintyrei
intro: Neopanax macintyrei, a species of plant in the family Araliaceae, is commonly known as the mountain matipo or five-finger. The plant is native to New Zealand and has been traditionally used by the indigenous Maori people for its medicinal properties. Neopanax macintyrei is rich in saponins, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds that have been found to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Neopanax macintyrei include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function, and it is often prepared as a tincture, infusion, or topical cream for medicinal use.
